response: The SRE team reported that the annual disaster recovery test has been completed, with the actual recovery time objective (RTO) of 6 hours 23 minutes missing the 4-hour target because the database restore took three hours instead of the projected one hour due to a larger-than-expected dataset. The team recommended two corrective actions—increasing backup frequency and pre-provisioning a standby database—and scheduled the next disaster recovery test for October.
